card_description: Nick is a fictional character referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. First appears in *dream*. Context: "Dick details the transition from the "Father" stage (1974 - Justice/Warrior) to the "Son" stage (1975 - Spring King/Dancing Youth)."

linked_segments.summary: Dick proposes a "Brain Colony" or "Grain Brain" model of the universe, where individual humans are interconnected cells in a vast compound eye of the Immanent Mind. He explores the "male womb" of Zeus
